title: Decoding the obfuscated bash script on a Uniqlo t-shirt
titleZh: 解读优衣库T恤上的混淆bash脚本
author: speerer
relevanceReason: 帖子详细描述了如何解码一件优衣库T恤上印制的混淆bash脚本，涉及Base64编码、OCR识别、脚本逆向分析等技术内容，属于编程与极客文化范畴。
summaryRaw: When my wife said to me “Let me show you a t-shirt I saw…”, I wasn’t sure what to expect, but it definitely wasn’t an obfuscated bash script printed on the back designed to print a happy Easter egg message. I’m not in the habit of clickbaity headlinesI’ve no idea at all how many views this site gets, but I’m willing to bet it’s not even double-digit humans per month. but I can see why subeditors have such fun with them. The title above is, strictly speaking, entirely accurate, but probably not what you think. The obfuscated code in question is actually an easter egg, it’s being supplied via Uniqlo stores on an excellent t-shirt designed by Akamai in support of their Peace for All campaign. And it’s very cool! The front has a heart in curly braces:While the back has a big alphanumeric block: Is that … a shebang?!My wife was right that I’d want to see it. Was that… a shebang? Take a closer look at the text block: Yes, a shebang! On a t-shirt sold in a high street store, no less. And it is clearly a base64 encoded Here string being fed to eval via base64 --decode. Interesting. I told my wife "that’s basically how people ship viruses’ and bought it. OCR was cumbersomeThere was good news and bad news: The bad news was that base64 hasn’t got error correction, meaning that the transcription would need to be perfect. Sigh. The good news was that the string seemed to be intact - at least, it terminated with the expected padding and had matching quotes and braces. This is a good thing because Uniqlo x Akamai sells another design of shirt in the same range which is plainly incompleteFor example, its imports are truncated and it ends “retu” instead of “return”. This is a pity, because it’s a really nice colour combination and contains the highly idiomatic instruction go doStuff(msg, work... which anyone can relate to., a truncated crop from a wider text block which could never compile. I ran OCR in a few ways: First, using the built-in OCR of the circle-to-search feature on Android, which is often very good. Second, by using Tesseract with a few options and tweaks. And third by running it through Claude. After diffing the three to look for mismatches and getting Claude to output a table of locations for quick scanning, it became trivial but time-consuimg to tidy up the remainder. The resulting string was: 
The decoded scriptAfter Base64 decoding, the resulting script is a welcoming and nicely commented Easter egg:#!/bin/bash
# Congratulations! You found the easter egg! ❤️ # おめでとうございます！隠されたサプライズを見つけました！❤️
# Get terminal dimensions cols=$(tput cols) lines=$(tput lines)
summaryZh: 作者发现优衣库与Akamai合作的“Peace for All”系列T恤背面印有混淆的bash脚本彩蛋。
通过OCR工具（Android内置、Tesseract、Claude）识别并还原Base64编码内容，最终解码出一段终端动画脚本。
解码后的脚本会在终端循环显示彩色“PEACE FOR ALL”文字动画，并包含多语言祝贺信息。
highlightsZh: T恤上印有真实的shebang（#!/bin/bash）和Base64编码内容，极具极客趣味。
作者对比了三种OCR工具的识别结果，展示了AI辅助代码还原的实际应用。
同系列另一款T恤上的代码被截断，无法编译，引发社区对“代码完整性”的讨论。
彩蛋脚本使用256色终端输出和三角函数计算位置，实现动态文字动画效果。
该设计由Akamai支持公益项目推出，将技术元素融入时尚单品，引发广泛传播。

comments.author: estebarb
comments.textRawHtml:
"Uniqlo x Akamai sells another design of shirt in the same range which is plainly incomplete"

Imagine having to return a t-shirt because that malfunction!

— I don't understand why are you returning this, was the size wrong or you didn't like it?

— No, there is a syntax error at line 37 that makes it impossible to run, and I'm concerned people on the street may think I promote unsafe bash scripting.
comments.textZhHtml:
“Uniqlo x Akamai 销售同系列的另一种设计的衬衫，这显然不完整”

想象一下，因为故障而必须退回一件 T 恤！

— 我不明白你为什么要退回这件衣服，是尺码错误还是你不喜欢它？

— 不，第 37 行存在语法错误，导致无法运行，我担心人们会在街上可能会认为我宣扬不安全的 bash 脚本。

children.author: arikrahman
children.textRawHtml: Not everyone has a 6 pack sir!
children.textZhHtml: 不是每个人都有 6 块腹肌先生！

children.author: mcdonje
children.textRawHtml: ATTN, Uniqlo customer service employees: If someone tries to return a shirt claiming an error in the printed computer code, decline the request and reply, "A real script kiddie would've spotted that error before buying."
children.textZhHtml: ATTN，优衣库客户服务员工：如果有人试图退回一件衬衫，声称打印的计算机代码有错误，请拒绝该请求并回复，“真正的脚本小子在购买之前会发现该错误。”

children.author: deathanatos
children.textRawHtml:
A real hacker, maybe. A script kiddie is by definition someone who wouldn't notice.

http://www.catb.org/jargon/html/S/script-kiddies.html
children.textZhHtml:
真正的黑客，也许吧。脚本小子按定义就是那种根本察觉不到的人。

http://www.catb.org/jargon/html/S/script-kiddies.html

children.author: boothby
children.textRawHtml: I made the slightly alarming realization yesterday that some script kiddies are old enough to have grandkids by now.
children.textZhHtml: 昨天我略感震惊地意识到，有些脚本小子如今都已经到了当爷爷的年纪。

children.author: QuantumNomad_
children.textRawHtml: I wonder how many of them graduated to the level of hacker witches / hacker wizards, and how many of them are nothing but script grannies / script grampses even today.
children.textZhHtml: 我想知道他们中有多少人已经进阶到了黑客女巫/黑客巫师的水平，又有多少人直到今天还只是些脚本老太/脚本老头。

children.author: noisy_boy
children.textRawHtml: - I am shell-shocked at the lack of quality assurance! Can you at least apply a patch?
children.textZhHtml: - 我对缺乏质量保证感到震惊！你至少可以打个补丁吗？

children.author: entropie
children.textRawHtml: Patch could be applied via pants.
children.textZhHtml: 补丁可以直接打在裤子上。

children.author: alentred
children.textRawHtml: - Sure, we distribute a patch, you hot-fix it.
children.textZhHtml: - 没问题，我们发布补丁，你来热修复。

children.author: NonHyloMorph
children.textRawHtml: The person downvoting this doesn't know how to hold an iron (presumably).
children.textZhHtml: 给这条评论点踩的人，估计连熨斗都不会拿。

children.author: karussell
children.textRawHtml: Cut & paste getting more real then!
children.textZhHtml: 那“剪切与粘贴”可就变得更写实了！

children.author: Octoth0rpe
children.textRawHtml: Surely such a person would use the spelling k@r3n
children.textZhHtml: 这种人肯定会用 k@r3n 这种拼法。
